scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 m=audio 48538 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 101 a=ptime:20 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 m=image 48540 udptl t38 a=T38FaxUdpEC:t38UDPRedundancy a=T38FaxRateManagement:transferredTCF

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] [last_To] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=sqn: 0 a=cdsc: 1 image udptl t38 m=audio 48538 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 101 a=recvonly a=ptime:20 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=sqn: 0 a=cdsc: 1 image udptl t38 m=audio 48538 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 101 a=recvonly a=ptime:20 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20
